idea-plugin.name: SigMap - AI Context Engine
idea-plugin.description:
SigMap — 97% Token Reduction for AI Coding Assistants

Zero-dependency AI context engine that extracts code signatures from 21 languages and generates compact context files for GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, and other AI assistants.

Features

  • Automatic Context Generation — Extracts function signatures, class definitions, and type information
  • Health Status Bar — Shows context health grade (A-F) and time since last regeneration
  • Toolbar Actions — Regenerate context, open context file, view roadmap with one click
  • Stale Context Alerts — Notifies when context is over 24 hours old
  • 21 Language Support — TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, Kotlin, Go, Rust, C++, C#, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Dart, Scala, Vue, Svelte, HTML, CSS, YAML, Shell, Dockerfile

Learn more at manojmallick.github.io/sigmap/
